calendar.description: Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
House Public Utilities and Energy Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses geothermal resources or fluids.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>addresses the reservation of a geothermal resource on state and institutional trust land;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies the purposes of the geothermal chapter;<hr><ltbullet>addresses definitions;<hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to ownership of geothermal resources or fluids;<hr><ltbullet>amends powers of the Division of Water Rights related to confidentiality of information;<hr><ltbullet>addresses bonding requirements; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming amendments.
